features: Multiple Sockets: The Power Cube extension lead is featured with 4 AC outlets and 2 USB ports (5V/2.1A), 1.5m power cable for optimal reach. You can charge your phones, tablet, power bank, laptop and multiple devices simultaneously. Advanced technology grants USB charging speed up to 2.1A per port by optimally distributing the current.

Childproof Sockets: Spring-loaded receptacle cover plates prevent the insertion of objects when unequal pressure is applied. Align the prongs to plug into the sockets. Keep your child safe with our childproof shutters.

Compact & Portable: Perfectly sized for any wall outlet in your living room, office, classroom, and bedroom. Connect up to 6 devices at once in all directions with this neat little cube. Small enough to fit in a backpack or briefcase, ideal for home, office, or travel.

Fixable Installation: Our cube-shaped power extension can be mounted with the tapes or nails provided on your desk or underneath it, which perfectly avoids outlet blockage and makes charging easier and more efficient.

What You Get: EXTRASTAR 4 sockets Power Cube with 2 USB ports and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: Product Description Brand: ExtraStar Color: Red+White Sockets type: UK Output: 5V/2.1A Input: 13A/250V Cable Length: 1.5m Power Cord: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² Total Max Load: 3120W Fire Retardant: 750℃ ExtraStar Cube Extended 4 Ways Power Socket with 2 USB Charger 4 Gang with 2 USB Extension Cube Our uniquely designed cube-shape power extension comes with 2 USB ports and 4 sockets. With the included docking, the PowerCube can be mounted anywhere: on your desk or a wall, in home or office, and any other places you want. Perfect for traveling, compact in the bag and creates enough electrical outlets for laptop, mobile phone, camera and so on. Now you do not need to worry about running out of battery, as power is available right at your bedside. This power extension can only be available in UK. The maximum load for all devices that are linked in the chain. Make sure that the Cube does not carry more than 250g in attached power cords to avoid damage to the wall socket. Key Features Unique Design Comes with dual USB ports and four AC outlets, you can charge electronic devices (via its high-powered 2.1A dual USB ports) and household appliances (via 13A/250V~ AC outlets) simultaneously by placing a PowerCube nearby. Fixable Installation Our cube-shaped power extension can be mounted with the tapes or nails provided on your desk or underneath it, which perfectly avoids outlet blockage and makes charging easier and more efficient. High Grade Material Anti-Fire material using higher quality standard power cord (firefroof temperature up to 750℃), high temperature resistant and flame retardant provide effective fire protection to eliminate hidden dangers. Sturdy Copper Cable 3*1.25mm²#13A copper fused cable will NOT get soften and deformation easily. Provide protection against short circuit, heat-resistant, over-current and over-voltage. Laboratory
